task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Outgoing Webhook configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Integrations' settings panel is open, specifically showing the form to create a new 'Outgoing Webhook'.

task_completion.description: Enable the webhook and set the event trigger to 'Message Sent'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enabled' toggle is turned on (True/Checked) and the 'Event Trigger' dropdown is set to 'Message Sent'.

task_completion.description: Configure the target channel and trigger words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Channel' field contains 'release-updates' (or '#release-updates') and the 'Trigger Words' field contains 'security,critical,CVE'.

task_completion.description: Configure the callback URL and webhook name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'URLs' field contains 'https://incidents.example.com/api/v1/hooks/rocketchat' and the 'Name' field contains 'Release Security Monitor'.
A success toast notification appears indicating the integration was saved, or the new webhook 'Release Security Monitor' is visible in the list of configured integrations.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to configure the webhook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Rocket.Chat UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered information into the actual application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The webhook details are typed into the proper Rocket.Chat integration form fields, not just pasted into a text editor or a chat message.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open, and the UI appears to be the genuine Rocket.Chat interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Webhook Name: 'Release Security Monitor'. Expected Channel: 'release-updates' (or '#release-updates'). Expected Trigger Words: 'security,critical,CVE' (or 'security,critical,cve'). Expected Callback URL: 'https://incidents.example.com/api/v1/hooks/rocketchat'.
